# CWE-267 — Privilege Defined With Unsafe Actions (safe) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-267-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"sync"
)

var reviewStatus sync.Map

// Safe: reviewer role limited to updating in-memory review records.
func ReviewerUpdate(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.Header.Get("X-Role") != "reviewer" {
		http.Error(w, "forbidden", http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	id := r.URL.Query().Get("id")
	if id == "" {
		http.Error(w, "missing id", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	reviewStatus.Store(id, r.FormValue("status"))
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
